_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of the capabilities of different electronic communication systems and methods (e.g., e-mail, VOIP, IM, web forums, Direct Video Broadcasts).
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of BI platform capabilities (e.g., Power BI, Tableau, Looker, MicroStrategy) including data model design, calculated field logic, performance optimization, and security implementation.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI AB domain. AB-K-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DQ-K-010 (DQ, cosine: 0.511), DA-K-012 (DA, cosine: 0.479).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.0/10 (raw 0.396). Shared vocabulary: [capabilities, knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [broadcasts, communication, different, direct, electronic, forums] vs WIDAI-only terms [bi, calculated, data, design, field, implementation] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.869 (P=0.877, R=0.861). Balanced P/R — the 20-word DCWF element and 23-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Knowledge of the capabilities of different electronic communication systems and" and "Knowledge of BI platform capabilities (e.g., Power BI, Tableau, Looker, MicroStr" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.517 > STS 0.396 (gap +0.121). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [capabilities, knowledge] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 16.2%. Shared tokens: [capabilities, knowledge]. DCWF-only: [broadcasts, communication, different, direct, electronic, forums]. WIDAI-only: [bi, calculated, data, design, field, implementation].

signals.detail: Bi-encoder/STS gap 0.121 suggests some vocabulary-driven inflation in candidate selection.
